title: hieracium caesium subsp. respondens
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. respondens, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. respondens include reducing inflammation, promoting digestive health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties.
